name: Empire Equine
seoDescription: Empire Equine: mobile equine veterinary care in Sonoma County led by Dr. Michelle Beko (UC Davis '91). Preventative, dental, lameness, reproduction, 24hr emergency.

hero.heading: Expert horse care from a Sonoma County vet who rides
hero.subheading: Dr. Michelle Beko, a UC Davis graduate and lifelong horsewoman, has cared for the area's horses through Empire Equine since 1992.

highlights: Led by Dr. Michelle Beko, UC Davis DVM (1992)
Full-service equine care across Sonoma County
From backyard companions to upper-level sport horses

about.heading: About Empire Equine
body: Empire Equine was founded decades ago by Dr. Jack Woolsey and Dr. Bob Norrie. Today it is owned by Dr. Michelle Beko, a UC Davis veterinary graduate, former Eventing competitor, and seasoned horse owner who joined the practice in 1992 and continues their legacy of excellence.

From our base at 2318 Olivet Ln in Santa Rosa, we provide up-to-date, high-quality, and compassionate care to all kinds of horses, donkeys, mules, ponies, and miniatures, ranging from high-performance athletes to pleasure, backyard, and elderly horses. We welcome novice owners with full support and education.

services.title: Preventative & Wellness Care
services.description: Routine exams, vaccinations, and parasite control to keep your horse healthy year-round.

services.title: Annual Health Maintenance Program
services.description: Two yearly visits bundling physical exam, vaccinations, deworming, and teeth floating.

services.title: Dental Care
services.description: Teeth floating and dental treatments to support comfort and proper nutrition.

services.title: Lameness Evaluations
services.description: Diagnostic workups to find and address the source of lameness and performance issues.

services.title: Advanced Diagnostics
services.description: On-site diagnostic tools to investigate illness and injury accurately.

services.title: Reproductive Services
services.description: Breeding support including live cover and artificial insemination.

services.title: Prepurchase Examinations
services.description: Thorough evaluations to inform your decision before buying a horse.

services.title: 24-Hour Emergency Care
services.description: Round-the-clock urgent care for when your horse needs help right away.

items.a: You'll find us at 2318 Olivet Ln.
Hours can vary — give us a call at 7075453909 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at 7075453909 — we're glad to help.
